summary: The Prettier check failed because at least one file is not properly formatted, causing the prettier-check step to exit non‑zero.
root_cause: Prettier check failed: the file packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js is not formatted according to the project's Prettier rules, causing the prettier-check script to exit with code 1.

evidence.quote: This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
evidence.reason: Indicates the repository enforces Prettier formatting.

evidence.quote: Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The CI output instructs to run yarn prettier-all to fix formatting issues.
This file is listed by the Prettier script as needing formatting.
Shows the Prettier script that was executed as part of the prettier-check step.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Confirms the Prettier check command failed and caused the job to exit non-zero.

suggested_fix: Run yarn prettier-all (or run the project's Prettier script) locally or in CI to format files, then add and commit the changes (specifically format packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js) before re-running the workflow.
